steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: In the sentence “the toxins the organism uses to protect itself from predation actually ______ its attractiveness to predators,” the subject of the blank verb is “the toxins”—a plural noun.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: ”Increase” is the plural present-tense form—the base form used with plural subjects. The other options—”is increasing,” “increases,” and “has increased”—are all singular forms. That matches choice B — B is correct.
